sourcePrompt: An M1911A1 Colt .45 pistol, the US officer sidearm, about twenty-five centimeters long. A compact semi-automatic handgun with a slab-sided slide over a short barrel, a hammer at the rear, a curved grip with checkered walnut panels raked back from the trigger guard, and a flat single-stack magazine base at the heel. Blued and parkerized steel, classic. Low-poly, game-ready, clean hard edges.
